div.h2: O_NONBLOCK: Two Personalities of the Same read()

g.text: Behavioral Comparison: same read() syscall, two personalities
Buffer empty | sleep until data arrives | return -EAGAIN immediately
Buffer has data | copy data, return n | copy data, return n
CPU during wait | 0% (task sleeps, preempted) | never waits, returns fast
Use case | pipes, terminals, simple IPC | event loops, epoll, servers
errno on no data | (never reaches userspace) | EAGAIN = EWOULDBLOCK = 11
